title: astragalus tricholobus subsp. hohenackeri
intro: Astragalus tricholobus subsp. hohenackeri, also known as Hohenacker's milkvetch, is a plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus tricholobus subsp. hohenackeri include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the body's natural response to illness and infection. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and tinctures, to promote overall well-being and longevity.
